9f561fd4fd299a1f7ab92d2981cfe02b33137790: $$\int_{1}^{+\infty}\left(e^{-\cos{\frac{1}{x}}} - e^{-1}\right)x^{k}dx$$

af5d7c2a3de63c7633c61aed25cdc4f3f411ce16: $$k$$

4ca2f7c9c36956a79700e498b06923d2adacb97e: $$\alpha > 0$$

8ef79590b04215a5c9cf12d6e10f0e63afc9ca2a: $$\int_{0}^{1} \frac{\ln x}{x^{\alpha}} \mathrm{d}x$$

6c56d31194a611b13f4e484f1c6f6dd380261d6f: $$\alpha \geqslant 1$$

53636bb52024042f105834b0c23090301aa1d87e: $$\int_{1}^{+\infty} \frac{\ln x}{x^{\alpha}} \mathrm{d}x$$

228b66d5483861c3941f18adae62b32c28ec1a9d: $$0 <   \alpha \leqslant 1$$

ce8ca857b53dd6debb272a90507a98cae6e6d670: $$\alpha >1$$

8b81253660d5678e8e24c41c0e2ac034c560f4c6: $$\alpha$$

a1594fba3e615a079ede371fd2881d00b89a354a: $$\int_{1}^{+\infty}\left[\ln \left(1 + \frac{1}{x}\right) - \frac{1}{1 + x}\right]\mathrm{d}x$$
